channel.title: Sven M. Lange on Blowfish
channel.description: Recent content in Sven M. Lange on Blowfish

item.title: Robust Phenotyping of Cognitive Variability Using Multimodal Neural Data
item.description: A framework for interpretable phenotyping across behavioral and neural modalities.

item.title: An Intervention Atlas for Computationally Defined Neurocognitive Subtypes
item.description: A translational framework connecting subtype models to candidate interventions.
